_readme: PHASE 3d FIELD cycle (ladder6, FROM-SCRATCH arm): identical to ladder6_warm EXCEPT laneInit main-0 = 'random' (mint a fresh 83-dim random-init v1 ckpt, honest zero-knowledge PPO start) instead of warm-starting from ladder5 gen60. Rationale: warm starts inherited and stayed in the low-attack VP basin in BOTH ladder4 and ladder5 — potential shaping couldn't pull them out. With the field lever now making a strong engine VP-optimal, a from-scratch policy has no low-attack prior to escape and may discover the strong-engine line the warm arm can't. This is the fallback arm: launch it if ladder6_warm's attack-gap probe is still flat by ~gen 15. Everything else (heuristicOpponentFraction 0.4 paragon/insane field, selfPlayFraction 0.35, ascend3, anneal 1.0->0.65/40, obs v1.2, gauntlet-v8, evalOpponents strong-first, promoteMarginElo 10) is IDENTICAL to the warm arm.
